title: Vegan Air Fryer Recipes: Quick, Crispy & Plant-Based
alt: A collection of easy vegan air fryer recipes including tofu, calzones, donuts, and more
description: The best vegan air fryer recipes all in one place — crispy tofu, calzones, donuts, curries, and more. Quick, plant-based, and no deep frying needed.
content:
## Why the Air Fryer Is a Vegan Game Changer

If you have not cooked tofu in an air fryer yet, you are missing out. The air fryer gives you that crispy exterior without deep frying, which means less oil, less mess, and less time standing over a stove. It is one of the best tools in a vegan kitchen.

Beyond tofu, the air fryer handles donuts, calzones, wraps, and more. Here are all our vegan air fryer recipes in one place.

## The Recipes

[recipes:Air Fryer]

## Tips for Best Results

### Pressing Tofu

Always press your tofu for at least 15 minutes before air frying. The drier the tofu, the crispier it gets.

### Oil and Spray

A light spray of neutral oil (avocado or sunflower) helps everything crisp up evenly.

### Temperature Guide

Most tofu and savory recipes work well at 375–400°F for 15–20 minutes, flipping halfway. Doughs like calzones and donuts do better at 350°F.

## FAQs

**Q: Can you cook tofu in the air fryer without oil?**

A: Yes! The tofu will still get crispy without oil, especially if it is well-pressed.

**Q: What vegan proteins work best in the air fryer?**

A: Extra-firm tofu is the star, but you can also air fry tempeh, vegan chicken strips, and even canned chickpeas.

**Q: Do I need to preheat the air fryer?**

A: Most models benefit from a 3-minute preheat, but it is not always required.
